#309

  | 

Katkame | 

 gmalpartout

Im already calm, why the need to bring out my flag in this discussion ? Stay on the topic and avoid useless ad hominems. They are a part of history, as aAa is literally the team that helped develop historical teams like verygames, titan, ldlc, envyus and g2 regarding the French-speaking CS. Once again, you don't need to be prestigious to make history. If aAa is known to CS fans, it's primarily for the impact they had on French esports, their longevity, and above all, for their pivotal role in the early development of Zywoo.

2026-04-21 16:28

Please log in and sync your account with Steam to upvote.

#374karrigan in FaZe's Major failure documentary: "We lost trust in each other"

 | 

 FSG45

Idek what options faze have atp

2026-04-22 23:05

Please log in and sync your account with Steam to upvote.

4

1 reply

#377

 lilfrier

1. Nuke the VRS and start from scratch, undersanding you might have to punt the second-half Major cycle to have a better long-term roster. In this scenario, you only keep Twistzz and frozen and sign a new AWPer and 2 riflers 2. Keep one of broky/jcobbb with Twistzz+frozen to hope VRS from the second-half is enough to push you over the hump for a Major qualification, compared to falling a bit short like 100T did by starting from scratch. 3. Sell off frozen and/or Twistzz, sign a new VRS core, and go from there. Within those decisions, you'll have to decide things like whether Twistzz is a long-term IGL solution, which player is easier to replace/upgrade from between broky and jcobbb, and which players/VRS cores might be on the market. Of course, there's also the question if Neityu is a true stand-in or getting a trial to have a spot in the long-term roster.

2026-04-23 00:04

6

#568

 echo_loop

This is not a "take" A banknote is a piece of paper. It can also be pixels on the screen, rendering glyphs for Arabic numerals, telling you how much of it you've got. Do the simple though experiment: There are many tribes without contact to outside civilization, and are in fact protected from it. What a 100$ bill means for a member of such tribes? Or pixels on the screen? Value given to money is by means of social contract, an agreement. We could also agree that a skin in a particular game has value. Money is a construct serving as unit to trade, much like a meter or an inch is a unit to measure length. You could invent one of your own, to trade, to measure, etc. Now what is the value of your own invention? The extent to which other people agree that it is of value.

2026-04-25 15:19

Please log in and sync your account with Steam to upvote.

4

1 reply

 | 

 CEMEN
